---
title: Wiki
date: 2019-09-09
title-block-banner: "#212529"
date-modified: last-modified
published-title: Last updated
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Contents"
---

## Design

- [Guide Design Resources](https://zlab.bio/guide-design-resources)
- [New CRISPR Method Allows Scientists to Understand Impact of Subtle Mutations](https://www.cuimc.columbia.edu/news/new-crispr-method-allows-scientists-understand-impact-subtle-mutations)
- [CRISPR Transfection Protocols Guide: How To Select The Best Method](https://www.synthego.com/guide/how-to-use-crispr/transfection-protocols)
- [How To Use CRISPR: Your Guide to Successful Genome Engineering](https://www.synthego.com/guide/how-to-use-crispr)
- [The Ultimate Guide To CRISPR: Mechanism, Applications, Methods & More](https://www.synthego.com/learn/crispr)
- [Irregular Protein Expression After CRISPR Edits: Troubleshooting Tips](https://www.synthego.com/blog/crispr-irregular-protein-expression)
- [CRISPR Editing in Primary Cells](https://www.synthego.com/crispr-primary-cells)


## Protocol

- [CrispR screen analysis using R and Bioconductor](https://rockefelleruniversity.github.io/RU_CrisprScreen/presentations/singlepage/crisprscreen.html#Crispr_Screenining_analysis_in_R)
